eventos.descripcion: The village square has been transformed into a museum of ice. Neighbors competed to build the tallest snow giant.
eventos.noticia: Despite the heavy blizzard, the "Ice Dragon" sculpture won first prize. The snow reached 2 meters this morning!

eventos.descripcion: A journey through the deep white forest under the full moon and total silence.
eventos.noticia: Absolute success. 20 skiers braved the -15°C temperature to enjoy the best powder snow of the decade.

eventos.descripcion: Community effort to shovel out the historical cabin that was completely buried by the storm.
eventos.noticia: It took 5 hours, but we found the door! Hot chocolate was served for all the volunteers after the hard work.

eventos.descripcion: The lake is finally thick enough. Join us for a morning of silence, patience, and very thick jackets.
eventos.noticia: Live update: The ice is 40cm thick. We are currently seeing some record-sized perches being caught!
